L1_headline: + HOLX – Charles J Dockendorff acquired 3,190 restricted stock units. | 02/26/2026
L2_brief: Director Charles J Dockendorff acquired 3,190 restricted stock units (RSUs) of Hologic Inc on 02/26/2026, which vest on the date of the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders and settle into common stock on a one-for-one basis. Following the transaction, Dockendorff holds 6,626 shares directly and 15,370 shares indirectly through a revocable trust.

L3_detailed.post_transaction_holdings: 6,626 shares (Direct) + 15,370 shares (Indirect, via Revocable Trust) = 21,996 total shares beneficially owned
L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a director RSU grant, consistent with routine annual equity compensation for board service. The RSUs vest at the 2027 Annual Meeting and settle in common stock on a one-for-one basis. No discretionary open-market purchase or sale activity reported in this filing.
risks_flagged: No 10b5-1 plan noted; transaction is a compensation-related RSU grant, not a discretionary trade
No price reported for the acquisition, consistent with an equity award rather than an open-market transaction
